title: Unguided Media Transmission Spectrum
description: A diagram showing the electromagnetic spectrum used for wireless communication, highlighting the different frequency bands and their common applications in computer networks.
relationships: Radio waves propagate in all directions for broadcast communication
Microwaves use directional parabolic antennas for point-to-point links
Infrared requires line-of-sight for short-range device communication
Satellites use microwave frequencies for long-distance links
